entry.title: Entry #671 in IN RE: Social Media Adolescent Addiction/Personal Injury Products Liability Litigation, MDL No. 3047
entry.summary: NOTICE OF POTENTIAL TAG-ALONG -- 1 Action(s) -- Filed by attorney Jonathan H. Blavin, counsel for Defendant Snap, Inc. -- ) (Attachments: # 1 Schedule of Actions, # 2 Exhibit A, # 3 Proof of Service) (Blavin, Jonathan) (Entered: 02/06/2026)

entry.title: Entry #670 in IN RE: Social Media Adolescent Addiction/Personal Injury Products Liability Litigation, MDL No. 3047
entry.summary: ORDER OF TRANSFEREE COURT -- (COUNSEL ASSIGNMENT(S)) Assigning Khaldoun Baghdadi for Plaintiffs' Steering Committee Signed by U.S. District Judge Yvonne Gonzalez Rogers and filed in the transferee court on 1/27/2026. (CT) Modified on 2/6/2026 (CT). REMOVED DUPLICATE PARTY TYPE. (Entered: 02/06/2026)

entry.title: Entry #669 in IN RE: Social Media Adolescent Addiction/Personal Injury Products Liability Litigation, MDL No. 3047
entry.summary: ***TEXT ONLY NOTICE******A PROOF OF SERVICE IS REQUIRED FOR ALL FILINGS***NOTICE OF FILING OF CTO AND PUBLICATION OF BRIEFING SCHEDULE (CTO-69) re: pldg. ( 668 in MDL No. 3047, 1 in MN/0:26-cv-00548, 1 in MN/0:26-cv-00549, 1 in MN/0:26-cv-00550) BRIEFING SCHEDULE IS SET AS FOLLOWS: Oppositions due on or before 2/11/2026.Attorneys must be registered to file in the JPML. Please visit our website for Registration Information. Signed by Acting Clerk of the Panel Marcella R. Lockert on 2/4/2026. Associated Cases: MDL No. 3047, MN/0:26-cv-00548, MN/0:26-cv-00549, MN/0:26-cv-00550 (CT) (Entered: 02/04/2026)
